attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
SQAPP.OBJECT_ID AS DEAL_APPROVER_QUEUE_KEY,
SQAPP.OBJECT_ID AS SK_OBJECT_ID_INT,
DEAL.BK_DEAL_ID, 
COALESCE(NDQ.BK_QUOTE_NUM,'UNKNOWN') AS BK_QUOTE_NUM,
COALESCE(SQAPP.APPROVAL_SCOPE_ID,-999) AS APPROVAL_SCOPE_INDICATOR_INT,
COALESCE(SQAPP.APPR_QUEUE_SEQ,'-999') AS APPROVAL_QUEUE_SEQ_INT,
COALESCE(NAPPRCIS.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,'-999') AS APPROVER_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(SQAPP.APPR_ROLE,'UNKNOWN') AS APPROVER_ROLE_NAME,
COALESCE(SQAPP.APPR_TEAM_ID,'-999') AS APPROVER_TEAM_ID_INT,
COALESCE(SQAPP.APPR_TEAM_NAME,'UNKNOWN') AS APPROVER_TEAM_NAME,
COALESCE(NCISCO.CISCO_WORKER_PARTY_KEY,'-999') AS DAT_MEMBER_CSCO_WRKR_PRTY_KEY,
COALESCE(SQAPP.DECISION_ID,'-999') AS DECISION_INDICATOR_INT,
COALESCE(SQAPP.DECISION_SLA,'-999') AS DECISION_SLA_HRS_CNT,
COALESCE(SQAPP.IS_CURRENT_APPROVER,'N') AS IS_CURRENT_APPROVER_FLG,
COALESCE(SQAPP.DECISION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS timestamp(0))) AS DECISION_DTM,
COALESCE(SQAPP.DECISION_DATE ,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS DV_DECISION_DT,
COALESCE(SQAPP.DECISION_PENDING_FROM_TS,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS timestamp(0))) AS DECISION_PENDING_FROM_DTM,
COALESCE(SQAPP.DECISION_PENDING_FROM_TS ,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS DV_DECISION_PENDING_FROM_DT,
COALESCE(SQAPP.CREATED_ON,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS timestamp(0))) AS SRC_CREATED_DTM,
COALESCE(SQAPP.CREATED_ON,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS DV_SRC_CREATED_DT,
COALESCE(SQAPP.UPDATED_ON,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS timestamp(0))) AS SRC_LAST_UPDATED_DTM,
COALESCE(SQAPP.UPDATED_ON,CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)) AS DV_SRC_LAST_UPDATED_DT,
COALESCE(SQAPP.IS_IMPLICIT_APPR,'N') AS IS_IMPLICIT_APPROVER_FLG,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0)EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER AS EDW_UPDATE_USER,
COALESCE(SQAPP.BH_REWARD_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS REWARD_CD,
COALESCE(SQAPP.DECISION,'UNKNOWN') AS APPROVAL_DECISION_STATUS_DESC,
'CCW' AS SS_CD,
'I' AS ACTION_CD,
'=' AS DML_TYPE_CD
 FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_CQ_APPROVAL_ROUTE SQAPP
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL DEAL
ON DEAL.SK_DEAL_OBJECT_ID_INT = SQAPP.DEAL_OBJECT_ID
AND DEAL.SS_CODE <> 'CCWR' /* Added as part of CCWR filter */
INNER JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL_QUOTE NDQ
ON NDQ.SK_QUOTE_OBJECT_ID_INT = SQAPP.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID
AND NDQ.SS_CODE <> 'CCWR' /* Added as part of CCWR filter */
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NAPPRCIS
ON NAPPRCIS.CEC_ID = SQAPP.APPR_CEC_ID
LEFT JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_WORKER_PARTY NCISCO
ON NCISCO.CEC_ID = SQAPP.DEFAULT_TEAM_MEMBER

SELECT SQAPP.OBJECT_ID, SQAPP.DEAL_OBJECT_ID, SQAPP.QUOTE_OBJECT_ID, SQAPP.APPROVAL_SCOPE, SQAPP.PRECEDENCE, SQAPP.APPR_QUEUE_SEQ, 
SQAPP.APPR_CEC_ID, SQAPP.APPR_ROLE, SQAPP.APPR_TEAM_ID, SQAPP.APPR_TEAM_NAME, SQAPP.DEFAULT_TEAM_MEMBER, SQAPP.DECISION, SQAPP.BH_REWARD_CODE,
SQAPP.CAN_MODIFY_DISCOUNT, SQAPP.IS_DYNAMICALLY_ADDED, SQAPP.CAN_ADD_APPROVER, SQAPP.READ_ONLY_FLAG, SQAPP.DECISION_SLA, SQAPP.REMINDER1_SLA, 
SQAPP.REMINDER2_SLA, SQAPP.ESC_SLA, SQAPP.ESC_TYPE, SQAPP.ESC_ACTION_TYPE, SQAPP.ESC_LEVEL, SQAPP.ESC_APPR_1, SQAPP.ESC_APPR_2, SQAPP.ESC_APPR_3, 
SQAPP.ESC_APPR_1_TEAM_NAME, SQAPP.ESC_APPR_2_TEAM_NAME, SQAPP.ESC_APPR_3_TEAM_NAME, SQAPP.IS_CURRENT_APPROVER, SQAPP.DECISION_SOURCE, 
SQAPP.DECISION_DATE, SQAPP.DECISION_PENDING_FROM_TS, SQAPP.CREATED_ON, SQAPP.CREATED_BY, SQAPP.UPDATED_ON, SQAPP.UPDATED_BY, SQAPP.NEXT_SLA_NOTIFN, 
SQAPP.ESC_APPR_1_TEAM_MAILER_ALIAS, SQAPP.ESC_APPR_2_TEAM_MAILER_ALIAS, SQAPP.ESC_APPR_3_TEAM_MAILER_ALIAS, SQAPP.IS_IMPLICIT_APPR,
SQAPP.DECISION_ID,
SQAPP.PRECEDENCE_ID,
SQAPP.APPROVAL_SCOPE_ID
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_CQ_APPROVAL_ROUTE SQAPP
WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_DEAL DEAL 
WHERE DEAL.SK_DEAL_OBJECT_ID_INT=SQAPP.DEAL_OBJECT_ID)
